extendedTextMessage.text:
┌─ *ADEVOS-X BOT FONT STYLES* ─┐
│
│ ✦ none
│   Default — Hello World
│
│ ✦ bold
│   Bold — *Hello World*
│
│ ✦ italic
│   Italic — _Hello World_
│
│ ✦ strikethrough
│   Strikethrough — ~Hello World~
│
│ ✦ mono
│   Monospace — ```Hello World```
│
│ ✦ serif_bold
│   Serif Bold — 𝐇𝐞𝐥𝐥𝐨 𝐖𝐨𝐫𝐥𝐝
│
│ ✦ serif_italic
│   Serif Italic — 𝐻𝑒𝑙𝑙𝑜 𝑊𝑜𝑟𝑙𝑑
│
│ ✦ serif_bold_italic
│   Serif Bold Italic — 𝑯𝒆𝒍𝒍𝒐 𝑾𝒐𝒓𝒍𝒅
│
│ ✦ script
│   Script — 𝒽𝑒𝓁𝓁𝑜 𝒲𝑜𝓇𝓁𝒹
│
│ ✦ bold_script
│   Bold Script — 𝓗𝓮𝓵𝓵𝓸 𝓦𝓸𝓻𝓵𝓭
│
│ ✦ fraktur
│   Fraktur — 𝔥𝔢𝔩𝔩𝔬 𝔚𝔬𝔯𝔩𝔡
│
│ ✦ double_struck
│   Double Struck — 𝕙𝕖𝕝𝕝𝕠 𝕎𝕠𝕣𝕝𝕕
│
│ ✦ sans
│   Sans Serif — 𝖧𝖾𝗅𝗅𝗈 𝖶𝗈𝗋𝗅𝖽
│
│ ✦ sans_bold
│   Sans Bold — 𝗛𝗲𝗹𝗹𝗼 𝗪𝗼𝗿𝗹𝗱
│
│ ✦ sans_italic
│   Sans Italic — 𝘏𝘦𝘭𝘭𝘰 𝘞𝘰𝘳𝘭𝘥
│
│ ✦ sans_bold_italic
│   Sans Bold Italic — 𝙃𝙚𝙡𝙡𝙤 𝙒𝙤𝙧𝙡𝙙
│
│ ✦ circled
│   Circled — ⒽⒺⓁⓁⓄ ⓦⓞⓡⓛⓓ
│
│ Usage: .setfont <name>
│ Example: .setfont bold_script
│ Reset: .setfont none
│
└─────────────────────────┘

imageMessage.caption:
Happy Birthday, homie 🎉
You’ve been there through the tough times, and I’ll never forget that. I appreciate you more than words can say. You’re not just a friend — you’re a brother… family.
You’ve always been dear to me and I truly value that. One day soon we go pack those bags and chase the bigger life we’ve been talking about.
Stay blessed always, Jethro. More life, more wins
Nou single passons a autre chose 🚶
